meaning: vt.娇养,溺爱,放纵n.西班牙长耳猎犬,喜好或举办斗鸡的人
examples: The cake featured his black and white Cocker Spaniel wearing a pair of his glasses.
When she saw her friend Mandy walking her cocker spaniel, she would call out, "Hello, Mandy!"
"I would never eat dog meat," said Louisa Yong, as she clutches her pet cocker spaniel. "It's so cruel!"
Cocker spaniels have been stolen from their kennels in rural locations in the last week.
Singer Jarvis Cocker and actress Anjelica Huston are among members of the judging panel for best film.
